title: ConfirmToolAction
description: Action: `confirm_tool_action`. Sent in response to a `write_confirmation_required` event. Resumes the paused agent workflow with the user's approval or rejection decision. Approved calls proceed; rejected calls are skipped and the agent receives the rejection as context.

Request.title: ConfirmToolActionRequest
Request.description: Fields sent by the client to approve or reject a pending tool write.

requestId.description: Must match the `requestId` from the `write_confirmation_required` event being responded to. This is how the server correlates the confirmation back to the paused workflow.

sessionId.description: Session ID of the paused session.

approved.description: True to allow the tool call to proceed; false to reject it. On rejection the agent workflow resumes with an informational context message.

Response.title: ConfirmToolActionResponse
Response.description: There is no dedicated response event for `confirm_tool_action`. After the confirmation is received, the agent workflow resumes and emits the normal streaming sequence (`stream_chunk` / `stream_token` → `eventual_response`). This schema is provided for documentation completeness only.
No dedicated response — the workflow continuation is signalled by resumed streaming events.
